attributes.action: Have Royal Mail Cover route 77 in Marden
attributes.additional_details: Route 77 at Royal Mail Tonbridge does not have regular postman resulting in the above estates receiving post once a week/fortnight. They do not prioritise 1st class and only deliver 1st class tracked parcels on a daily basis and all post and untrack parcels are left behind. We would like this covered regularly as this is a security risk if you are waiting on a new debit/credit card and the card and pin arrive together. Fines/bills arrive late.
attributes.background:
The following roads in Marden (Route 77 at Royal Mail Tonbridge) don' t have a regular postman.
Seymour Dr, Blossom Dr, Primrose Cl, Clover Dr, Campion Way, Bluebell Dr, Poppy Walk, Cornflower Dr, Admiral Way, Archer Rd, Phoenix Rd, Minstrel Cl, Pioneer Av, Cascade Cl, Pilgrim Cl, Challenger Wy

rejection.details:
We can’t accept petitions that call for action at a local level.

You could ask your MP to take action on your concerns about this issue.

You can find contact details for your local MP here: https://members.parliament.uk/FindYourMP
